name: fusion-agent-codex
description: Safe Codex plugin for the Fusion Agent CAD harness.

interface.shortDescription: Use the safe Fusion Agent CAD harness from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Fusion Agent Codex exposes the memory-backed, mock-first Fusion Agent harness through one safe MCP server. It routes all CAD work through the harness facade, planner, verifier, repair loop, journals, memory, and benchmarks instead of exposing raw Autodesk Fusion MCP tools.
